overall.description: A nighttime walk through a futuristic cyberpunk metropolis featuring neon-lit skyscrapers, flying vehicles, and dense urban architecture. The footage from Cyberpunk 2077 shows a continuous journey from covered walkways to open streets, highlighting the game's vibrant neon aesthetic and futuristic vehicle traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway alongside busy street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a covered walkway with neon-lit storefronts visible ahead

notable_agents.action: black van driving past on the adjacent street

entered.detail: metal and glass roof structure covering the pedestrian walkway
large red neon sign reading 'CIRQUE' mounted on the left wall
green metal railing separating walkway from the street below
tall building covered in colorful neon advertisements and lights

segments.scene_description: Walking along a covered pedestrian walkway with a green paved surface. The CIRQUE neon sign is prominent on the left wall while a metal railing separates the path from the busy street where vehicles pass by. The ceiling is covered with a roof structure, and neon-lit buildings are visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with crosswalk and hover vehicle traffic

events.description: exits covered walkway and transitions to open street level at a crosswalk
black sports car crosses the intersection in front of the camera
futuristic red hover car with glowing green undercarriage appears and drives along the street

agents.ego_description: moving through the street intersection, observing the futuristic traffic and vehicles

notable_agents.action: sleek black sports car crossing the yellow-striped crosswalk
red hover car driving along the road with glowing green lights underneath

entered.detail: low-profile black sports car with angular design crossing the intersection
futuristic red vehicle hovering above the ground with green neon underglow
purple neon sign reading 'HOTEL' on a green building facade
yellow striped pedestrian crossing lines on the asphalt
elevated walkway or transit bridge spanning across the street ahead

segments.scene_description: The scene opens to street level at a crosswalk where a black sports car passes by. A futuristic red hover car with glowing green lights appears and drives along the road. The HOTEL neon sign is visible on a green building facade to the right, and an elevated transit bridge spans the street ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved city street with dense neon signage and overhead red lanterns

events.description: camera continues along curved sidewalk as red hover car moves ahead into the distance
red paper lanterns become visible hanging overhead across the street

agents.ego_description: walking along a curved sidewalk passing various pedestrians and neon billboards

notable_agents.action: woman with dark hair walking toward the camera on the sidewalk
man in red jacket walking along the sidewalk in the same direction

entered.detail: string of traditional red paper lanterns hanging overhead across the street
large horizontal billboard displaying 'ACT NOW' with product imagery
concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art

segments.scene_description: Moving along a curved sidewalk with a graffiti-covered wall on the right. Red paper lanterns hang overhead between buildings. The red hover car continues ahead and moves into the distance. Various pedestrians walk along the path, and large neon billboards illuminate the scene including one displaying 'ACT NOW'.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered pedestrian corridor into the vibrant, open chaos of a neon-lit cyberpunk street. It begins along a covered walkway with green paving, passing a prominent CIRQUE neon sign while vehicles blur past behind a metal railing. As the camera emerges from the roof structure to street level, the view opens at a crosswalk where a black sports car and a glowing red hover car navigate the road beneath an elevated transit bridge and a HOTEL sign. The scene then shifts onto a curved sidewalk lined with graffiti-covered walls and overhead red paper lanterns, following the red hover car as it recedes into the distance. Finally, the perspective moves past bustling pedestrians toward towering neon billboards, including one flashing ACT NOW, which bathe the urban landscape in intense light.
